# Error Handling Best Practices

> Proven patterns for structured logging, error context propagation, and failure handling.

## Entries

- [Structured Logging with Winston](structured-logging-winston.md): JSON logging with timestamps, error stacks, default metadata, and child loggers. RECOMMENDED.

- [Tenant lifecycle status checks at the auth-guard layer](lifecycle-status-check-at-guard-layer.md): Inject the write-block check into shared auth guards on mutating HTTP methods. Every existing route picks it up automatically; suspended/locked/archived tenants return 423 Locked without per-route changes. RECOMMENDED.
